description.description: Short description shown on card and detail page

github_stars.description: GitHub repo path (owner/repo) for live star count

importance.description: Sort order — lower numbers appear first

category.description: Badge label shown on card (e.g. open source)

redirect.description: Redirect to this URL instead of the project page

related_publications.description: Citation keys from papers.bib to show as References

giscus_comments.description: Enable Giscus comments on this project page
